text.title: Changelog Automation Conventional Commits Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a release by range cleanliness → conventional-commits compliance → breaking → semver bump. Branches name observable inputs; leaves reference rules.

decision-tree.root-question: Are prerequisites satisfied: range_from + range_to bounded, prior CHANGELOG present?

branch.question: Is the history clean (no merge-commit noise in the range)?
Are all commits conventional-commits compliant (deviations empty)?
Does declared release_version match computed semver bump per r5?

text.example: prereqs_met=true → merge_noise_present=false → deviations_present=false → bump_mismatch=false (computed major, declared v2.0.0) → verdict=emit-changelog (ref run-the-checklist).
